final_prompt.prompt:
Create a single large educational knowledge card for children explaining the story of 三国赤壁之战 (all in-image text in Chinese).

Style/medium: needs a "卡通画故事" aesthetic for children — references in the spirit of 上海美术电影制片厂 classic animation heritage, 故宫文创 children's illustration series, 丰子恺 storytelling illustration tradition; exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be single large knowledge card layout with clear title area and adjacent bullet-point list
Subject: must include the story of 三国赤壁之战 as the central narrative
Scene/backdrop: 
Lighting/mood: needs a storytelling atmosphere suitable for children — exact tone is yours
Color palette: 
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): must include clear title and bullet-point key facts with punctuation
Constraints: must include all in-image text in Chinese by default; must be child-friendly educational format
Avoid:
